metadata.name: Update Ad Creative in a Live Campaign

description: An ad creative is experiencing fatigue (declining performance). A manager needs to swap it out with a new one.

nodes.task_description: Identify the underperforming ad creative in the campaign.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the ad with the declining CTR.
Agent successfully pauses the fatigued ad.

nodes.task_description: Create a new ad within the same ad set using the new creative assets.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully uploads and launches the new ad.
